Function.Inference: The entire track is a single loop body ending with a repeat sign at bar 48.

Section.Inference: High-register ostinato motif establishes the primary rhythmic feel.
Main lyrical melody is introduced over the driving bassline.
Ostinato motif returns, with the bass dropping out towards the end.
The main melody repeats in full with the bass returning.
The ostinato motif returns, this time played an octave lower.
Main melody repeats again, and the bass drops out before the loop resets.
